ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_BACKEND.name: causal_backend
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_BACKEND.description: Backend for call-stack sampling. See https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocprofiler-systems/en/latest/how-to/performing-causal-profiling.html#backends for more info. If set to "auto", rocprof-sys will attempt to use the perf backend and fallback on the timer backend if unavailable

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_BINARY_EXCLUDE.name: causal_binary_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_BINARY_EXCLUDE.description: Excludes binaries matching the list of provided regexes from causal experiments (separated by tab, semi-colon, and/or quotes (single or double))

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_BINARY_SCOPE.name: causal_binary_scope
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_BINARY_SCOPE.description: Limits causal experiments to the binaries matching the provided list of regular expressions (separated by tab, semi-colon, and/or quotes (single or double))

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_DELAY.name: causal_delay
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_DELAY.description: Length of time to wait (in seconds) before starting the first causal experiment

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_DURATION.name: causal_duration
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_DURATION.description: Length of time to perform causal experimentation (in seconds) after the first experiment has started. After this amount of time has elapsed, no more causal experiments will be performed and the application will continue without any overhead from causal profiling. Any value <= 0 means until the application completes

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_END_TO_END.name: causal_end_to_end
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_END_TO_END.description: Perform causal experiment over the length of the entire application

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FILE.name: causal_file
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FILE.description: Name of causal output filename (w/o extension)

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FILE_RESET.name: causal_file_reset
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FILE_RESET.description: Overwrite any existing causal output file instead of appending to it

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FIXED_SPEEDUP.name: causal_fixed_speedup
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FIXED_SPEEDUP.description: List of virtual speedups between 0 and 100 (inclusive) to sample from for causal profiling

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FUNCTION_EXCLUDE.name: causal_function_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FUNCTION_EXCLUDE.description: Excludes functions matching the list of provided regexes from causal experiments (separated by tab, semi-colon, and/or quotes (single or double))

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FUNCTION_EXCLUDE_DEFAU.name: causal_function_exclude_defaults
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FUNCTION_EXCLUDE_DEFAU.description: This controls adding a series of function exclude regexes to avoid experimenting on STL implementation functions, etc. which are, generally, not helpful. Details: excludes demangled function names starting with '_' or containing '::_M'.

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FUNCTION_SCOPE.name: causal_function_scope
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FUNCTION_SCOPE.description: List of <function> regex entries for causal profiling (separated by tab, semi-colon, and/or quotes (single or double))

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_MODE.name: causal_mode
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_MODE.description: Perform causal experiments at the function-scope or line-scope. Ideally, use function first to locate function with highest impact and then switch to line mode + ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_FUNCTION_SCOPE set to the function being targeted.

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_RANDOM_SEED.name: causal_random_seed
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_RANDOM_SEED.description: Seed for random number generator which selects speedups and experiments -- please note that the lines selected for experimentation are not reproducible but the speedup selection is. If set to zero, std::random_device{}() will be used.

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_SOURCE_EXCLUDE.name: causal_source_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_SOURCE_EXCLUDE.description: Excludes source files or source file + lineno pair (i.e. <file> or <file>:<line>) matching the list of provided regexes from causal experiments (separated by tab, semi-colon, and/or quotes (single or double))

ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_SOURCE_SCOPE.name: causal_source_scope
ROCPROFSYS_CAUSAL_SOURCE_SCOPE.description: Limits causal experiments to the source files or source file + lineno pair (i.e. <file> or <file>:<line>) matching the provided list of regular expressions (separated by tab, semi-colon, and/or quotes (single or double))

ROCPROFSYS_CI.name: ci
ROCPROFSYS_CI.description: Enable some runtime validation checks (typically enabled for continuous integration)

ROCPROFSYS_DIFF_OUTPUT.name: diff_output
ROCPROFSYS_DIFF_OUTPUT.description: Generate a difference output vs. a pre-existing output (see also: INPUT_PATH and INPUT_PREFIX)

ROCPROFSYS_DISABLE_CATEGORIES.name: disable_categories
ROCPROFSYS_DISABLE_CATEGORIES.description: Disable collecting profiling and trace data for these categories

ROCPROFSYS_ENABLE_CATEGORIES.name: enable_categories
ROCPROFSYS_ENABLE_CATEGORIES.description: Enable collecting profiling and trace data for these categories and disable all other categories

ROCPROFSYS_FLAT_PROFILE.name: flat_profile
ROCPROFSYS_FLAT_PROFILE.description: Set the label hierarchy mode to default to flat

ROCPROFSYS_INPUT_EXTENSIONS.name: input_extensions
ROCPROFSYS_INPUT_EXTENSIONS.description: File extensions used when searching for input files used in difference comparisons (see also: DIFF_OUTPUT)

ROCPROFSYS_INPUT_PATH.name: input_path
ROCPROFSYS_INPUT_PATH.description: Explicitly specify the input folder for difference comparisons (see also: DIFF_OUTPUT)

ROCPROFSYS_INPUT_PREFIX.name: input_prefix
ROCPROFSYS_INPUT_PREFIX.description: Explicitly specify the prefix for input files used in difference comparisons (see also: DIFF_OUTPUT)

ROCPROFSYS_KOKKOSP_DEEP_COPY.name: kokkosp_deep_copy
ROCPROFSYS_KOKKOSP_DEEP_COPY.description: Enable tracking deep copies (warning: may corrupt flamegraph in perfetto)

ROCPROFSYS_KOKKOSP_NAME_LENGTH_MAX.name: kokkosp_name_length_max
ROCPROFSYS_KOKKOSP_NAME_LENGTH_MAX.description: Set this to a value > 0 to help avoid unnamed Kokkos Tools callbacks. Generally, unnamed callbacks are the demangled name of the function, which is very long

ROCPROFSYS_KOKKOSP_PREFIX.name: kokkosp_prefix
ROCPROFSYS_KOKKOSP_PREFIX.description: Set to [kokkos] to maintain old naming convention

ROCPROFSYS_MAX_DEPTH.name: max_depth
ROCPROFSYS_MAX_DEPTH.description: Set the maximum depth of label hierarchy reporting

ROCPROFSYS_MAX_WIDTH.name: max_width
ROCPROFSYS_MAX_WIDTH.description: Set the maximum width for component label outputs

ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_PRECISION.name: memory_precision
ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_PRECISION.description: Set the precision for components with 'is_memory_category' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_SCIENTIFIC.name: memory_scientific
ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_SCIENTIFIC.description: Set the numerical reporting format for components with 'is_memory_category' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_UNITS.name: memory_units
ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_UNITS.description: Set the units for components with 'uses_memory_units' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_WIDTH.name: memory_width
ROCPROFSYS_MEMORY_WIDTH.description: Set the output width for components with 'is_memory_category' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_MODE.name: mode
ROCPROFSYS_MODE.description: Data collection mode. Used to set default values for ROCPROFSYS_USE_* options. Typically set by rocprof-sys binary instrumenter.

ROCPROFSYS_NODE_COUNT.name: node_count
ROCPROFSYS_NODE_COUNT.description: Total number of nodes used in application. Setting this value > 1 will result in aggregating N processes into groups of N / NODE_COUNT

ROCPROFSYS_NUM_THREADS_HINT.name: num_threads_hint
ROCPROFSYS_NUM_THREADS_HINT.description: This is hint for how many threads are expected to be created in the application. Setting this value allows rocprof-sys to preallocate resources during initialization and warn about any potential issues. For example, when call-stack sampling, each thread has a unique sampler instance which communicates with an allocator instance running in a background thread. Each allocator only handles N sampling instances (where N is the value of ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_ALLOCATOR_SIZE). When this hint is set to >= the number of threads that get sampled, rocprof-sys can start all the background threads during initialization

ROCPROFSYS_OUTPUT_PATH.name: output_path
ROCPROFSYS_OUTPUT_PATH.description: Explicitly specify the output folder for results

ROCPROFSYS_OUTPUT_PREFIX.name: output_prefix
ROCPROFSYS_OUTPUT_PREFIX.description: Explicitly specify a prefix for all output files

ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_EVENTS.name: papi_events
ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_EVENTS.description: PAPI presets and events to collect (see also: papi_avail)

ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_FAIL_ON_ERROR.name: papi_fail_on_error
ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_FAIL_ON_ERROR.description: Configure PAPI errors to trigger a runtime error

ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_OVERFLOW.name: papi_overflow
ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_OVERFLOW.description: Value at which PAPI hw counters trigger an overflow callback

ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_QUIET.name: papi_quiet
ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_QUIET.description: Configure suppression of reporting PAPI errors/warnings

ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_THREADING.name: papi_threading
ROCPROFSYS_PAPI_THREADING.description: Enable multithreading support when using PAPI

ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_ANNOTATIONS.name: perfetto_annotations
ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_ANNOTATIONS.description: Include debug annotations in perfetto trace. When enabled, this feature will encode information such as the values of the function arguments (when available). Disabling this feature may dramatically reduce the size of the trace

ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_BACKEND.name: perfetto_backend
ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_BACKEND.description: Specify the perfetto backend to activate. Options are: 'inprocess', 'system', or 'all'

ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_FILL_POLICY.name: perfetto_fill_policy
ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_FILL_POLICY.description: Behavior when perfetto buffer is full. 'discard' will ignore new entries, 'ring_buffer' will overwrite old entries

ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_SHMEM_SIZE_HINT_KB.name: perfetto_shmem_size_hint_kb
ROCPROFSYS_PERFETTO_SHMEM_SIZE_HINT_KB.description: Hint for shared-memory buffer size in perfetto (in KB)

ROCPROFSYS_PRECISION.name: precision
ROCPROFSYS_PRECISION.description: Set the global output precision for components

ROCPROFSYS_PROCESS_SAMPLING_DURATION.name: process_sampling_duration
ROCPROFSYS_PROCESS_SAMPLING_DURATION.description: If > 0.0, time (in seconds) to sample before stopping. If less than zero, uses ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_DURATION

ROCPROFSYS_PROCESS_SAMPLING_FREQ.name: process_sampling_freq
ROCPROFSYS_PROCESS_SAMPLING_FREQ.description: Number of measurements per second when OMNITTRACE_USE_PROCESS_SAMPLING=ON. If set to zero, uses ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_FREQ value

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_DOMAINS.name: rocm_domains
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_DOMAINS.description: Specification of ROCm domains to trace/profile. Choices: hip_api, hip_compiler_api, hip_runtime_api, hsa_amd_ext_api, hsa_api, hsa_core_api, hsa_finalize_ext_api, hsa_image_ext_api, kernel_dispatch, marker_api, memory_allocation, memory_copy, ompt, page_migration, rccl_api, rocdecode_api, runtime_initialization, scratch_memory

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_EVENTS.name: rocm_events
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_EVENTS.description: ROCm hardware counters. Use ':device=N' syntax to specify collection on device number N, e.g. ':device=0'. If no device specification is provided, the event is collected on every available device

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_COMPILER_API_OPERATI.name: rocm_hip_compiler_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_COMPILER_API_OPERATI.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_COMPILER_API_OPERATI.name: rocm_hip_compiler_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_COMPILER_API_OPERATI.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_COMPILER_API_OPERATI.name: rocm_hip_compiler_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_COMPILER_API_OPERATI.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_RUNTIME_API_OPERATIO.name: rocm_hip_runtime_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_RUNTIME_API_OPERATIO.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_RUNTIME_API_OPERATIO.name: rocm_hip_runtime_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_RUNTIME_API_OPERATIO.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_RUNTIME_API_OPERATIO.name: rocm_hip_runtime_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HIP_RUNTIME_API_OPERATIO.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_AMD_EXT_API_OPERATIO.name: rocm_hsa_amd_ext_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_AMD_EXT_API_OPERATIO.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_AMD_EXT_API_OPERATIO.name: rocm_hsa_amd_ext_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_AMD_EXT_API_OPERATIO.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_AMD_EXT_API_OPERATIO.name: rocm_hsa_amd_ext_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_AMD_EXT_API_OPERATIO.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_CORE_API_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_hsa_core_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_CORE_API_OPERATIONS.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_CORE_API_OPERATIONS_.name: rocm_hsa_core_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_CORE_API_OPERATIONS_.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_CORE_API_OPERATIONS_.name: rocm_hsa_core_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_CORE_API_OPERATIONS_.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_FINALIZE_EXT_API_OPE.name: rocm_hsa_finalize_ext_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_FINALIZE_EXT_API_OPE.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_FINALIZE_EXT_API_OPE.name: rocm_hsa_finalize_ext_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_FINALIZE_EXT_API_OPE.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_FINALIZE_EXT_API_OPE.name: rocm_hsa_finalize_ext_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_FINALIZE_EXT_API_OPE.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_IMAGE_EXT_API_OPERAT.name: rocm_hsa_image_ext_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_IMAGE_EXT_API_OPERAT.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_IMAGE_EXT_API_OPERAT.name: rocm_hsa_image_ext_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_IMAGE_EXT_API_OPERAT.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_IMAGE_EXT_API_OPERAT.name: rocm_hsa_image_ext_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_HSA_IMAGE_EXT_API_OPERAT.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MARKER_API_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_marker_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MARKER_API_OPERATIONS.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MARKER_API_OPERATIONS_AN.name: rocm_marker_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MARKER_API_OPERATIONS_AN.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MARKER_API_OPERATIONS_EX.name: rocm_marker_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MARKER_API_OPERATIONS_EX.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_OPERAT.name: rocm_memory_allocation_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_OPERAT.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_OPERAT.name: rocm_memory_allocation_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_OPERAT.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_OPERAT.name: rocm_memory_allocation_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_ALLOCATION_OPERAT.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_COPY_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_memory_copy_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_COPY_OPERATIONS.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_COPY_OPERATIONS_A.name: rocm_memory_copy_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_COPY_OPERATIONS_A.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_COPY_OPERATIONS_E.name: rocm_memory_copy_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_MEMORY_COPY_OPERATIONS_E.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_OMPT_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_ompt_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_OMPT_OPERATIONS.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_OMPT_OPERATIONS_ANNOTATE.name: rocm_ompt_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_OMPT_OPERATIONS_ANNOTATE.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_OMPT_OPERATIONS_EXCLUDE.name: rocm_ompt_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_OMPT_OPERATIONS_EXCLUDE.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RCCL_API_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_rccl_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RCCL_API_OPERATIONS.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RCCL_API_OPERATIONS_ANNO.name: rocm_rccl_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RCCL_API_OPERATIONS_ANNO.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RCCL_API_OPERATIONS_EXCL.name: rocm_rccl_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RCCL_API_OPERATIONS_EXCL.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_ROCDECODE_API_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_rocdecode_api_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_ROCDECODE_API_OPERATIONS.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_ROCDECODE_API_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_rocdecode_api_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_ROCDECODE_API_OPERATIONS.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_ROCDECODE_API_OPERATIONS.name: rocm_rocdecode_api_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_ROCDECODE_API_OPERATIONS.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RUNTIME_INITIALIZATION_O.name: rocm_runtime_initialization_operations
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RUNTIME_INITIALIZATION_O.description: Inclusive filter for domain operations (for API domains, this selects the functions to trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RUNTIME_INITIALIZATION_O.name: rocm_runtime_initialization_operations_annotate_backtrace
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RUNTIME_INITIALIZATION_O.description: Specification of domain operations which will record a backtrace (for API domains, this is a list of function names) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RUNTIME_INITIALIZATION_O.name: rocm_runtime_initialization_operations_exclude
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_RUNTIME_INITIALIZATION_O.description: Exclusive filter for domain operations applied after the inclusive filter (for API domains, removes function from trace) [regex supported]

ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_SMI_METRICS.name: rocm_smi_metrics
ROCPROFSYS_ROCM_SMI_METRICS.description: rocm-smi metrics to collect: busy, temp, power, vcn_activity, mem_usage

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_ALLOCATOR_SIZE.name: sampling_allocator_size
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_ALLOCATOR_SIZE.description: The number of sampled threads handled by an allocator running in a background thread. Each thread that is sampled communicates with an allocator running in a background thread which handles storing/caching the data when it's buffer is full. Setting this value too high (i.e. equal to the number of threads when the thread count is high) may cause loss of data -- the sampler may fill a new buffer and overwrite old buffer data before the allocator can process it. Setting this value to 1 will result in a background allocator thread for every thread started by the application.

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUS.name: sampling_cpus
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUS.description: CPUs to collect frequency information for. Values should be separated by commas and can be explicit or ranges, e.g. 0,1,5-8. An empty value implies 'all' and 'none' suppresses all CPU frequency sampling

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME.name: sampling_cputime
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME.description: Enable sampling frequency via a timer that measures both CPU time used by the current process, and CPU time expended on behalf of the process by the system. This is recommended.

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_DELAY.name: sampling_cputime_delay
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_DELAY.description: Time (in seconds) to wait before the first CPU-time sampling signal is delivered. Defaults to ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_DELAY when <= 0.0

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_FREQ.name: sampling_cputime_freq
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_FREQ.description: Number of software interrupts per second of CPU-time. Defaults to ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_FREQ when <= 0.0

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_SIGNAL.name: sampling_cputime_signal
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_SIGNAL.description: Modify this value only if the target process is also using the same signal (SIGPROF)

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_TIDS.name: sampling_cputime_tids
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_CPUTIME_TIDS.description: Same as ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_TIDS but applies specifically to samplers whose timers are based on the CPU-time. This is useful when you want to restrict samples to particular threads.

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_DELAY.name: sampling_delay
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_DELAY.description: Time (in seconds) to wait before the first sampling signal is delivered, increasing this value can fix deadlocks during init

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_DURATION.name: sampling_duration
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_DURATION.description: If > 0.0, time (in seconds) to sample before stopping

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_FREQ.name: sampling_freq
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_FREQ.description: Number of software interrupts per second when OMNITTRACE_USE_SAMPLING=ON

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_GPUS.name: sampling_gpus
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_GPUS.description: Devices to query when ROCPROFSYS_USE_ROCM_SMI=ON. Values should be separated by commas and can be explicit or ranges, e.g. 0,1,5-8. An empty value implies 'all' and 'none' suppresses all GPU sampling

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_INCLUDE_INLINES.name: sampling_include_inlines
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_INCLUDE_INLINES.description: Create entries for inlined functions when available

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_KEEP_INTERNAL.name: sampling_keep_internal
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_KEEP_INTERNAL.description: Configure whether the statistical samples should include call-stack entries from internal routines in rocprof-sys. E.g. when ON, the call-stack will show functions like rocprofsys_push_trace. If disabled, rocprof-sys will attempt to filter out internal routines from the sampling call-stacks

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW.name: sampling_overflow
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW.description: Enable sampling via an overflow of a HW counter. This requires Linux perf (/proc/sys/kernel/perf_event_paranoid created by OS) with a value of 2 or less in that file

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW_FREQ.name: sampling_overflow_freq
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW_FREQ.description: Number of events in between each sample. Defaults to ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_FREQ when <= 0.0

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW_SIGNAL.name: sampling_overflow_signal
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW_SIGNAL.description: Modify this value only if the target process is also using the same signal (SIGRTMIN + 1)

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW_TIDS.name: sampling_overflow_tids
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_OVERFLOW_TIDS.description: Same as ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_TIDS but applies specifically to samplers whose samples are based on the overflow of a particular event. This is useful when you want to restrict samples to particular threads.

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME.name: sampling_realtime
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME.description: Enable sampling frequency via a wall-clock timer. This may result in typically idle child threads consuming an unnecessary large amount of CPU time.

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_DELAY.name: sampling_realtime_delay
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_DELAY.description: Time (in seconds) to wait before the first real (wall) time sampling signal is delivered. Defaults to ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_DELAY when <= 0.0

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_FREQ.name: sampling_realtime_freq
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_FREQ.description: Number of software interrupts per second of real (wall) time. Defaults to ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_FREQ when <= 0.0

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_SIGNAL.name: sampling_realtime_signal
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_SIGNAL.description: Modify this value only if the target process is also using the same signal (SIGRTMIN)

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_TIDS.name: sampling_realtime_tids
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_REALTIME_TIDS.description: Same as ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_TIDS but applies specifically to samplers whose timers are based on the real (wall) time. This is useful when you want to restrict samples to particular threads.

ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_TIDS.name: sampling_tids
ROCPROFSYS_SAMPLING_TIDS.description: Limit call-stack sampling to specific thread IDs, starting at zero for the main thread. Be aware that some libraries, such as ROCm may create additional threads which increment the TID count. However, no threads started by rocprof-sys will increment the TID count. Values should be separated by commas and can be explicit or ranges, e.g. 0,1,5-8. An empty value implies all TIDs.

ROCPROFSYS_SCIENTIFIC.name: scientific
ROCPROFSYS_SCIENTIFIC.description: Set the global numerical reporting to scientific format

ROCPROFSYS_STRICT_CONFIG.name: strict_config
ROCPROFSYS_STRICT_CONFIG.description: Throw errors for unknown setting names in configuration files instead of emitting a warning

ROCPROFSYS_SUPPRESS_CONFIG.name: suppress_config
ROCPROFSYS_SUPPRESS_CONFIG.description: Disable processing of setting configuration files

ROCPROFSYS_THREAD_POOL_SIZE.name: thread_pool_size
ROCPROFSYS_THREAD_POOL_SIZE.description: Max number of threads for processing background tasks

ROCPROFSYS_TIMELINE_PROFILE.name: timeline_profile
ROCPROFSYS_TIMELINE_PROFILE.description: Set the label hierarchy mode to default to timeline

ROCPROFSYS_TIMEMORY_COMPONENTS.name: timemory_components
ROCPROFSYS_TIMEMORY_COMPONENTS.description: List of components to collect via timemory (see `rocprof-sys-avail -C`)

ROCPROFSYS_TIME_FORMAT.name: time_format
ROCPROFSYS_TIME_FORMAT.description: Customize the folder generation when TIME_OUTPUT is enabled (see also: strftime)

ROCPROFSYS_TIME_OUTPUT.name: time_output
ROCPROFSYS_TIME_OUTPUT.description: Output data to subfolder w/ a timestamp (see also: TIME_FORMAT)

ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_PRECISION.name: timing_precision
ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_PRECISION.description: Set the precision for components with 'is_timing_category' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_SCIENTIFIC.name: timing_scientific
ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_SCIENTIFIC.description: Set the numerical reporting format for components with 'is_timing_category' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_UNITS.name: timing_units
ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_UNITS.description: Set the units for components with 'uses_timing_units' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_WIDTH.name: timing_width
ROCPROFSYS_TIMING_WIDTH.description: Set the output width for components with 'is_timing_category' type-trait

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_DELAY.name: trace_delay
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_DELAY.description: Time in seconds to wait before enabling trace/profile data collection. If multiple delays + durations are needed, see ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_PERIODS.

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_DURATION.name: trace_duration
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_DURATION.description: If > 0.0, time (in seconds) to collect trace/profile data. If multiple delays + durations are needed, see ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_PERIODS.

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_PERIODS.name: trace_periods
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_PERIODS.description: Similar to specify trace delay and/or duration except in the form <DELAY>:<DURATION>, <DELAY>:<DURATION>:<REPEAT>, and/or <DELAY>:<DURATION>:<REPEAT>:<CLOCK_ID>

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_PERIOD_CLOCK_ID.name: trace_period_clock_id
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_PERIOD_CLOCK_ID.description: Set the default clock ID for ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_DELAY, ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_DURATION, and/or ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_PERIODS. E.g. "realtime" == the delay/duration is governed by the elapsed realtime, "cputime" == the delay/duration is governed by the elapsed CPU-time within the process, etc. Note: when using CPU-based timing, it is recommened to scale the value by the number of threads and be aware that rocprof-sys may contribute to advancing the process CPU-time

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_BARRIERS.name: trace_thread_barriers
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_BARRIERS.description: Enable tracing calls to pthread_barrier functions.

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_JOIN.name: trace_thread_join
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_JOIN.description: Enable tracing calls to pthread_join functions.

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_LOCKS.name: trace_thread_locks
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_LOCKS.description: Enable tracing calls to pthread_mutex_lock, pthread_mutex_unlock, pthread_mutex_trylock

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_RW_LOCKS.name: trace_thread_rw_locks
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_RW_LOCKS.description: Enable tracing calls to pthread_rwlock_* functions. May cause deadlocks with ROCm-enabled OpenMPI.

ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_SPIN_LOCKS.name: trace_thread_spin_locks
ROCPROFSYS_TRACE_THREAD_SPIN_LOCKS.description: Enable tracing calls to pthread_spin_* functions. May cause deadlocks with MPI distributions.

ROCPROFSYS_USE_PID.name: use_pid
ROCPROFSYS_USE_PID.description: Enable tagging filenames with process identifier (either MPI rank or pid)

ROCPROFSYS_USE_PROCESS_SAMPLING.name: use_process_sampling
ROCPROFSYS_USE_PROCESS_SAMPLING.description: Enable a background thread which samples process-level and system metrics such as the CPU/GPU freq, power, memory usage, etc.

ROCPROFSYS_USE_RCCLP.name: use_rcclp
ROCPROFSYS_USE_RCCLP.description: Enable support for ROCm Communication Collectives Library (RCCL) Performance

ROCPROFSYS_USE_ROCM.name: use_rocm
ROCPROFSYS_USE_ROCM.description: Enable ROCm API and kernel tracing

ROCPROFSYS_USE_ROCM_SMI.name: use_rocm_smi
ROCPROFSYS_USE_ROCM_SMI.description: Enable sampling GPU power, temp, utilization, vcn_activity and memory usage

ROCPROFSYS_USE_TEMPORARY_FILES.name: use_temporary_files
ROCPROFSYS_USE_TEMPORARY_FILES.description: Write data to temporary files to minimize the memory usage of rocprof-sys, e.g. call-stack samples will be periodically written to a file and re-loaded during finalization

ROCPROFSYS_WIDTH.name: width
ROCPROFSYS_WIDTH.description: Set the global output width for components
